title: 4D/3N The Best of Pattaya & Bangkok Thailand Experience
details: Highlights: Bangkok City Tour, Wat Arun with Chaophraya River Boat Ride, Sanctuary of Truth, Nong Nooch Village & Tropical Garden, Damnoen Saduak Floating Market, and free time for shopping. A perfect short getaway blending culture, nature, and city life.

itinerary.day_details: Meet and greet at the airport. Buffet lunch at a local Thai restaurant. Half-day Bangkok City Tour. Visit Wat Arun with roundtrip boat transfer across the Chaophraya River, Metal Castle, and Gems Shop. Hotel check-in and overnight in Bangkok. Flight: MNL–BKK 5J929 07:20AM–10:00AM.

Breakfast at hotel. Whole-day Pattaya tour. Visit Sanctuary of Truth and Khao Chi Chan (Laser Buddha). Buffet lunch at Nong Nooch Village & Tropical Garden. Buffet dinner at Pattaya Tower. Evening return to Bangkok. Overnight in Bangkok.

Breakfast at hotel. Early morning pick-up for Maeklong Railway Market and Damnoen Saduak Floating Market with boat ride. Lunch at a local Thai restaurant. Return to hotel in the afternoon. Overnight in Bangkok.
Breakfast at hotel. Free time for leisure and shopping. Transfer to airport for departure back to Manila. Flight: DMK–MNL 5J864 11:00PM–03:45AM (+1). Home sweet home.

inclusions: Private coach airport and tour transfers
Wat Arun with Chaophraya River Boat Ride
Damnoen Saduak Floating Market with boat ride
extra_details: Hotel Options: Tarawish Hotel 3★ – ₱32,888/pax | Midtown Hotel 4★ – ₱36,888/pax | Berkley Hotel 5★ – ₱38,888/pax
Mode of Payment: ₱5,000 first down payment to guarantee reservation, ₱5,000 second down payment after one month, remaining balance 30 days before travel date.
Holiday and peak-season surcharges apply as indicated.
